## Scope
- [ ] Register options + register verification endpoints
- [ ] Auth options + auth verification endpoints
- [ ] Client register/login UX with fallback to email+MFA

## Acceptance
- [ ] Face ID/passkey can sign in and issue Firebase session/custom token
- [ ] Credentials are listed and revocable from account settings
